description: Creates a ray on a number line extending infinitely in one direction from a point
utility: Visualizes open-ended inequalities (x > a, x ≤ b) with customizable endpoints and styling

arguments.name: numberLine
arguments.description: The number line to place the ray on

arguments.name: x
arguments.description: The starting position of the ray

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Ray direction and endpoint type: type(rightclosed), type(rightopen), type(leftclosed), type(leftopen)

arguments.name: color
arguments.description: Optional color using c(colorName). Defaults to blue

arguments.name: offset
arguments.description: Optional vertical offset from axis using buff(pixels)

alternates.description: Ray from x toward +infinity with filled endpoint: [x, ∞)
Ray from x toward +infinity with hollow endpoint: (x, ∞)
Ray from x toward -infinity with filled endpoint: (-∞, x]
Ray from x toward -infinity with hollow endpoint: (-∞, x)

examples.expression: N = nl(at(1,1), 2, 8, range(-5, 5)); ray(N, 2, type(rightclosed), c(red))
N = nl(at(1,1), 2, 8, range(0, 10)); ray(N, 4, type(rightopen), buff(10))
